narrative:
Aurelius Twp township has 213 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
